message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

actor Teams
boundary API
participant BuildService
participant CommandParser
participant BuildCommand
participant BuildSystem
participant BuildFactory
database BuildDb
participant BuildMonitor
participant NotificationService
database NotificationDb

Teams -> API : /api/messages
API -> BuildService : ProcessCommandAsync
BuildService -> CommandParser : ParseCommand
BuildService <-- CommandParser : BuildCommand
BuildService -> BuildCommand : Execute

BuildCommand -> BuildSystem : CreateBuildAsync

box "BuildSystem Library"
BuildSystem -> BuildFactory : CreateBuildAsync
BuildFactory -> BuildDb : Save build
BuildFactory --> BuildSystem : Build
BuildSystem -> BuildMonitor : AddBuildAsync
BuildSystem <-- BuildMonitor
end box

BuildCommand <-- BuildSystem : Build
BuildCommand -> NotificationService : AddNotificationAsync
NotificationService -> NotificationDb : Save notification
NotificationService <-- NotificationDb
BuildCommand <-- NotificationService
BuildService <-- BuildCommand
API <-- BuildService
Teams <-- API

@enduml
```
